message:
test(analysis): Add comprehensive tests for information theory and PCA

Expands test coverage for core analysis modules:

**information-theory.test.ts (+283 lines):**
- Edge case tests for KL/JS divergence with mismatched lengths
- mutualInformation: related sequences, property validation,
  different lengths, N character handling
- normalizedMutualInformation: range bounds [0,1], identical vs
  different sequences, zero entropy edge case
- relativeEntropy: identical distributions, symmetry, positive values
- analyzeInformationTheory: complete metrics structure, empty sequence
  handling, JSD comparison for similar vs different sequences
- entropyProfile: array validation, entropy value bounds

**pca.test.ts (+94 lines):**
- Principal component analysis test coverage expansion
- Validates PCA computation correctness and edge cases

These tests improve coverage from ~30% to comprehensive for these
critical comparison modules. Part of phage_explorer-wzjl.4 test suite.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
